storage.notes: microSD capacity not confirmed; supports Speco NVR-based recording.

features: advanced analytics (object removal, regional intrusion, abnormal video, line crossing, people intrusion) — requires a Speco NRE-series recorder for full functionality

frigate.notes: This is a 4-sensor stitched panoramic camera — it likely exposes either one stitched panoramic stream, four individual sensor streams, or both, depending on firmware configuration. Check the camera's web UI for the full RTSP channel list rather than assuming a single stream covers the full panoramic view. ONVIF Profile S is confirmed, which should support standard discovery, but the exact RTSP path was not found in the sources reviewed.

home_assistant.notes: ONVIF Profile S conformance explicitly confirmed by the manufacturer's own retailer-published spec sheet.

blue_iris.notes: Not independently confirmed with Blue Iris specifically; advanced analytics features require a Speco NRE recorder rather than a third-party NVR.
